seoTitle: Frankston vs Frankston North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Frankston and Frankston North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Frankston vs Frankston North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Frankston and Frankston North.
heading: Frankston vs Frankston North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Frankston, Victoria and Frankston North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Frankston has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Frankston North (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Frankston or Frankston North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Frankston has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Frankston North scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Frankston scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Frankston North scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Frankston or Frankston North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Frankston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
